JUDGE GEORGE CHOPPELAS RICHARD DUDUM FOR THE PLTF DEFT, SANDRA HOLMES, PRESENT AND IN PRO PER 10:45 AM C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ALL PRESENT. IN CHAMBERS, CASE SETTLED, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD BY PLTF'S COUNSEL AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTFS & AGAINST DEFT FOR RESTIT. & POSS. OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1200 - 3RD AVENUE, APT. # A, SF, CA. DEFT TO VACATE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 10/25/93 & NO LATER. PLTF. WAIVE ALL RENTS DUE & UNPAID UP TO 10/25/93 EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS/FEES. PLTF. TO FILE SATISFAC- TION OF JUDGMENT. AFTER POSS. IS RECOVERED. PLTF. TO PRE- PARE JUDGMENT.
